---
name: Compatibility issue
about: Report a mismatch between RhoeLanguage authority and an implementation
title: "[Compat]: "
labels: compatibility, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Which implementation, parser, target, or generated artifact disagrees with the
language authority?

## Reproduction

Please include the smallest fixture, document, schema sample, or command that
shows the mismatch.

## Expected Authority

Which RhoeLanguage section, schema, grammar, or registry should be treated as
the source of truth?

- Downstream repo or tool:
- Version or commit:
- Platform:
